description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Release that runs on workflow dispatch and when a release is published. The workflow has two jobs: create-release and create-docker-release. The create-release job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up environment variables, and then builds and packages the project using a series of make.sh commands. It then uploads the artifact and checksum to a release. The create-docker-release job depends on create-release, downloads the binaries, unpacks them, builds a Docker image, logs in to Docker Hub, and pushes the image to Docker Hub.
